description: Groundwork dependency updates via the hosted Mend Renovate app (installed account-wide, Interactive mode). The surfaces here are GitHub Actions SHA pins and the Dockerfile base image digest. Operational notes live in PLAYBOOK.md.

Policy mirrors the roost repo: weekly schedule, 4 day cooldown, grouped non-major updates, immediate security PRs. When the shared renovate-config preset repo exists, replace extends with github>jasondockery/renovate-config so the policy is defined once.
